details.test: Task 1: Request most affordable overnight plan under $180/night starting April 15, 2026
Task 2: Shortlist two Spanish-speaking caregivers with 5+ years experience and 4.5+ rating within 10 miles of 94105
Task 3: Select earliest available 2-hour post-surgery wound care visit for guest booking
Task 4: Choose cheaper dementia care package with at least 3 visits/week and schedule start date
Task 5: Complete needs assessment and schedule phone consultation on March 10, 2026
Task 6: Save and copy link to most popular fall-prevention article from last 12 months
Task 7: Create custom 10-hour weekly care plan under $700 and submit estimate request
Task 8: Reschedule existing home visit to March 8, 2026 at 10:00 AM (or nearest available)
